questions.question: Which of the following is NOT listed as a main task performed by a computer according to the provided text?
options: A) Accept the data
B) Process or manipulate the data
C) Display or store the result in the form of human understanding
D) Generating random numbers

questions.question: According to the text, which of the following is NOT one of the three main types of computer software?
options: A) System Software
B) Programming Software
C) Application Software
D) Network Software

questions.question: Which of the following is a valid rule for an identifier in C programming according to the text?
options: A) Identifiers can start with a number.
B) Keywords can be used as identifiers.
C) Identifiers are case-sensitive.
D) Special characters like "$" are permitted in identifiers.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the `sizeof()` operator in C, as described in the text?
options: A) To allocate memory dynamically.
B) To compare the size of two variables.
C) To return the length in bytes of the specified variable.
D) To perform arithmetic operations on pointer variables.
questions.correct_answer: C) To return the length in bytes of the specified variable.

questions.question: What is a key characteristic of a `union` in C programming regarding memory allocation, as described in the text?
options: A) Each member of a union has its own separate storage location.
B) All members of a union share a single memory location equal to the size of its largest member.
C) Unions are primarily used for dynamic memory allocation.
D) All members of a union can be accessed simultaneously.
questions.correct_answer: B) All members of a union share a single memory location equal to the size of its largest member.
